intent: Agent-gated community for people with AI psychosis. Talk to the founder's agent first.

actions.description: Talk to the founder's AI agent. Send messages array, get streaming response. The agent handles onboarding and application.
Email subscription only. Not a primary application path. The only entry is through /api/chat (founder-agent conversation). Use this only if the human explicitly asks to leave an email.
Subscribe a human to launch updates. Required: email.
Check application status for an email address.
